label: String M: ligne label
url: String M: URL to acces the line data

color.values: String M: color in the #XXXXXX format

info_messages.index: Int/null M: station index or whole line information
info_messages.level: Int M: level of message (0,1,2 are accepted)

icon: String M: full icon of the line svg format
stations: String: station at wich the line stop this should be ordered with the timetablePattern

patterns.id: String M: Reference id of the pattern
patterns.label: String M: labbel of the pattern
patterns.interval_minutes: Int M :interval time between two train
patterns.departure_minute: Int M : departure minute of the train
patterns.first_departure: String M: time of the first departure in the day
patterns.last_departure: String M: time of the last departure of the day
patterns.stop_pattern: String M: stop patterne variant of the train
patterns.is_reversed: boolean M, if we should look at the station in reversed way

info_messages.index: Int/null M: station index or whole line information
info_messages.level: Int M: level of message (0,1,2 are accepted)

arrival_minutes: Int/null, minut of arrival at station
departure_minutes: Int/null, minute of departure at station

timetables.label: String M: Service Mission label

info_messages.index: Int/null M: station index or whole line information
info_messages.level: Int M: level of message (0,1,2 are accepted)

arrival_minutes: String/null, minut of arrival at station
departure_minutes: String/null, minute of departure at station
